articles.author: Samsung U.S. Newsroom
articles.title: Samsung Brings AirDrop Support to Quick Share with Galaxy S26 Series - samsung.com
articles.description: Samsung is introducing AirDrop support to the Galaxy S26 series, making it easier for users to share content between devices using Quick Share. The feature will begin rolling out from March 231, starting in Korea and expanding to more regions including Europe…
articles.content:
Samsung is introducing AirDrop support to the Galaxy S26 series, making it easier for users to share content between devices using Quick Share.
